query: SELECT ac.id, ac.assessmentPdiId, ac.competenciaId, ac.nivelAtual, ac.metaFinal, c.nome as compNome FROM assessment_competencias ac LEFT JOIN competencias c ON ac.competenciaId = c.id WHERE ac.assessmentPdiId IN (SELECT id FROM assessment_pdi WHERE alunoId = 30066);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT ac.id, ac.assessmentPdiId, ac.competenciaId, ac.nivelAtual, ac.metaFinal, c.nome as compNome FROM assessment_competencias ac LEFT JOIN competencias c ON ac.competenciaId = c.id WHERE ac.assessmentPdiId IN (SELECT id FROM assessment_pdi WHERE alunoId = 30066);
